_doc: Recipe matrix config for the model-selection pipeline. Each matrix entry expands to recipes × thresholds × windows cells. Audit gates apply uniformly.

audit_gates._doc: G1 = statistical edge (t > t_min AND bootstrap CI strictly above 0 AND net-without-top-5-days >= 0). G2 = trade-rate sanity. Both must pass for a cell to PASS.

matrix.description: Phase 1: HPO-tuned option-PnL recipes across two non-overlapping holdout windows
matrix._notes: params_source_template currently points at non-existent canonical paths; pipeline.py falls back to default xgb params with a warning if the file is missing. We can rewire this once we settle on a canonical HPO output naming.
